scripts.prisma:migrate:prod: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, DATABASE_URL: process.env.DATABASE_URL_PROD }; if (!env.DATABASE_URL) { console.error('Falta DATABASE_URL_PROD en .env o en variables de entorno'); process.exit(1); } const result = spawnSync('npx', ['prisma', 'migrate', 'deploy'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
